title: 7 Herbal Teas to Help Pregnant Women Manage Chills
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas are a popular herbal remedy used to help alleviate chills. The tea's active compounds, such as glycyrrhizin and flavonoids, have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to reduce fever and soothe the body. Glycyrrhizin, in particular, has been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines, which can contribute to the development of chills.
